title: Random Respawn
description: Respawn in a random location after dying
body:
Turn your world into a semi-hard core world with random respawns! When you die, you will respawn at a COMPLETELY random location. It could be thousands of blocks away from your previous home.

Feel free to use this in whatever projects you may want it for (with credit of course)
Special thanks to LittleUphir on PMC for the idea!
